ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "test_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for testing the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file or the location where the model is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_test_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Preprocessing steps applied to the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the dataset */,
  "data_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset content and structure */,
  "data_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels to categorize the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the prediction */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the entity being predicted */,
  "foe" INTEGER /* True value of the target variable (foe) */,
  "foe_predictions" INTEGER /* Predicted value of the target variable (foe) */,
  "foe_prob_predictions" REAL /* Probability of the predicted value */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_details" TEXT /* Additional details or context about the prediction */,
  "prediction_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source or system where the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_details" TEXT /* Additional details or context about the metric */,
  "metric_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source or system where the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric calculation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_context" TEXT /* Additional context or details about the activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "training_data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version used for training the model */,
  "test_data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version used for testing the model */,
  "performance_metrics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metrics associated with this version */,
  "model_file_version_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file or the location where the model version is stored */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_training_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_version_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_test_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_data_version_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_performance_metrics_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_metrics_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "integration_details" TEXT /* Details of the integration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration */,
  "integration_status_details" TEXT /* Detailed status information */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful sync */,
  "next_sync_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next scheduled sync */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the integration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_integration_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
